description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a gable roof covered in dark, weathered shingles, some of which are mottled with moss. The lower portion of the structure is built from stacked stone blocks, while the upper section features vertical wooden planks. The corners are reinforced with rounded log ends, giving the cabin a traditional handcrafted appearance. There is a single wooden door on one side, and multiple windows with wooden shutters, some of which are open or slightly askew. A small stone chimney protrudes from the roof, suggesting the presence of a fireplace inside. The overall look is aged and weathered, with visible signs of moss and wear, evoking a sense of rural charm.
description: A rustic log cabin with a gable roof, stone base, vertical wood siding, and a stone chimney. Features include wooden windows with shutters and a weathered, mossy exterior.
description_view_0: This view shows the cabin's stone base, a centered wooden door, and the overhanging shingled roof with moss patches.
description_view_1: This side displays the gable end with vertical wood siding, a small window with open shutters, and the stone chimney on the roof.
description_view_2: Here, the stone base and vertical wood siding are visible, along with a window with shutters and moss growth on the wall.
description_view_3: This view highlights the gable end with a large window divided into panes, open shutters, and a fully wooden lower section.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in dark, weathered shingles and featuring a small stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows with wooden shutters, asymmetrically distributed; one large window on the gable end and smaller windows on the stone and wood facades, some shutters open and some closed
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the stone facade, beneath the roof overhang
